channel.title: Future on My Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Future on My Portfolio

item.title: Future
item.description:
This is soemthing that i want to tell my parents or having a mature mind!! idk.

as a young programmer from “India” theres a mentality i with you have to choose either engineer or doctor but in my case they force me !!

is a dead-fact i dont even choose cumputer as a subject so this lacks my certification over computers or programming language

as future for computing and ai in my point of veiw ai would not replace programming but make it fast and more user frendly.
